session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:
## Summary
**PR #9176**: `erk repo check` — Remote repo setup validation **URL**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9176
### New Files Created
**`src/erk/cli/commands/repo/`** — New `repo` command group: - `__init__.py` — `repo_group` Click group registering `check` subcommand - `check/__init__.py` — Empty - `check/checks.py` — Individual check functions (`check_workflow_exists`, `check_secret_exists`, `check_variable_not_disabled`, `check_workflow_permissions`, `check_label_exists`) + `RepoCheckItem` dataclass - `check/operation.py` — `RepoCheckRequest`, `RepoCheckResult`, `run_repo_check()` orchestrator - `check/cli.py` — Human CLI with `[PASS]`/`[FAIL]` colored output - `check/json_cli.py` — `@mcp_exposed` + `@machine_command` JSON adapter
**`src/erk/cli/commands/json/repo/`** — JSON command group: - `__init__.py` — `json_repo_group` registering `json_repo_check`
**`tests/unit/cli/commands/repo/check/`** — Unit tests: - `test_operation.py` — 12 tests covering format validation, all-pass, all-fail, mixed results, JSON serialization, and specific check categories
### Modified Files - `src/erk/cli/cli.py` — Imported and registered `repo_group` - `src/erk/cli/commands/json/__init__.py` — Imported and registered `json_repo_group` - `packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py` — Added `repo_check` to expected MCP tool set
### What Gets Checked - **7 workflows** (from `WORKFLOW_COMMAND_MAP`) - **3 secrets** (`ERK_QUEUE_GH_PAT`, `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, `CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN`) - **1 variable** (`CLAUDE_ENABLED` — fails only if explicitly `"false"`) - **1 permission** (`can_approve_pull_request_reviews`) - **4 labels** (from `get_erk_label_definitions()`: `erk-pr`, `erk-learn`, `erk-objective`, `no-changes`)
